scores.correctness_notes: Core answer matches gold standard exactly: temp_model fixture, deploy, wait with all_active. Additional patterns are accurate. Notes on all_agents_idle and any_error are correct.
scores.hallucination_notes: Minor issues: 'all_blocked', 'all_maintenance', 'all_waiting', 'any_active', 'any_blocked' listed as built-in helpers — gold standard only mentions all_active, all_agents_idle, any_error. Also 'delay=' parameter and 'is_active'/'is_blocked' attributes on app status objects are not confirmed in gold standard. Default timeout of 180s not confirmed (gold standard doesn't mention a default).
